audit_items.proof_trace: No explicit `calls[i].target != address(this)` guard exists in `_multiCall` or `auctionCallback`. However, every state-changing function on AuctionBidder is protected by role checks (`onlyRole(AUCTION_BIDDER_ROLE)`, `onlyRole(DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE)`) or strict caller validation (`msg.sender == address(s_auction)`); a self-call from within `_multiCall` presents `msg.sender = address(AuctionBidder)`, which fails all of these guards and reverts. The claimed reentrancy loop cannot complete in any standard deployment because no self-accessible entry point bypasses these controls.
